pokemon:genesect.name: Genesect
pokemon:genesect.summary: This Pokémon existed 300 million years ago. Team Plasma altered it and attached a cannon to its back.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: This Pokémon existed 300 million years ago. Team Plasma altered it and attached a cannon to its back.
Over 300 million years ago, it was feared as the strongest of hunters. It has been modified by Team Plasma.
This Pokémon existed 300 million years ago. Team Plasma altered it and attached a cannon to its back.
This ancient bug Pokémon was altered by Team Plasma. They upgraded the cannon on its back.
This ancient bug Pokémon was altered by Team Plasma. They upgraded the cannon on its back.
This Pokémon existed 300 million years ago. Team Plasma altered it and attached a cannon to its back.
